Terms and Conditions

By using the services of Core Leak Detection, you agree to the following terms and conditions.

Services

Core Leak Detection provides the following services: Residential Leak Detection, Commercial Leak Detection. All services are subject to availability and may vary based on your specific requirements.

Estimates and Pricing

All estimates are provided at no obligation and are valid for 30 days from the date of issue. Final pricing may vary based on the scope of work required. We always provide upfront pricing before commencing any work.

Payment

Payment is due upon completion of services unless otherwise agreed in writing. We accept cash, EFT, and card payments.

Liability

Core Leak Detection takes all reasonable care when performing services. We are Licensed and qualified and Insured.

Contact

For any questions regarding these terms, please contact us at or call (079) 540-1802.

Last updated: 2026
